Where Thomas Joannes Stieltjes is from, people speak the language of the country, which is English and the second language is Dutch. But in the Stieltje family, the first language is Dutch, the second language is English, right? So, when Thomas J. Stieltjes was born, he spoke Dutch first, then learned English later.
